display_information.name: VulnRap
display_information.description: Look up VulnRap scores for vulnerability reports without leaving Slack.
display_information.long_description: VulnRap is a free, open service that scores vulnerability reports for AI-generated 'slop', similarity duplication, and overall technical substance. This bot exposes a single slash command — /vulnrap <report-id> — that pulls the score for a report (e.g. 1234 from vulnrap.com/results/1234) and posts an in-channel card with the composite score, tier, top fired evidence signals, and a link to the full results page. The bot uses Socket Mode, so it does not need a public HTTPS endpoint.

slash_commands.description: Look up a VulnRap score for a vulnerability report ID.
